examples: During the disturbance which followed, three Englishmen were hurt.

Mad dogs and Englishmen, so the song has it, go out in the midday sun.
Gatland's squad for the tour includes 15 Welshmen, 10 Englishmen, nine Irishmen and three Scotsmen.
